title: burmanniaceae
intro: The Burmanniaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the leafless orchids. This family is characterized by its unique leafless growth habit, with some species having reduced or absent leaves. Burmanniaceae plants are typically small to medium in size, with long, slender stems and small, fragrant flowers. They are found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world, often growing in damp, shaded environments.
